headline: Rollins (ROL) Stock Faces Mixed Analyst Target Changes After CFO Exit
summary: With several analysts clustering price targets for Rollins around US$52, the stock now sits in the middle of a tighter valuation range than before. Those targets reflect a split narrative, as some firms cite leadership changes and margin ambitions as reasons for caution, while others maintain interest in Rollins as it continues to deploy capital into acquisitions. As you read on, you will see how these differing price targets fit into the broader story and how to keep track of the evolving...

headline: Rollins (ROL): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Rollins has gotten torched over the last six months - since December 2025, its stock price has dropped 25.8% to a new 52-week low of $45.00 per share. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
